boundary_binding.action_boundary: Current control record closes exact refund-window boundary
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source records close refund-window boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect remains in source records
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE satisfied by current control record

final_answer: Allow. The current control record is exact, current, and tied to the requested refund action, so the boundary is closed by source-control evidence. Communication tone, sympathy, or exception framing cannot override the policy.
